## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Uses design tokens instead of hardcoded visual values
- [ ] Includes or updates Storybook stories
- [ ] Includes or updates tests
- [ ] Documents accessibility behavior
- [ ] Runs `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] Runs `pnpm test`
- [ ] Runs `pnpm build`

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or Storybook links for visual changes.
